records.primary_theme: Nutrition, GI, and metabolic complications
secondary_themes: Care burden, adherence, and psychosocial impact
records.why_it_matters: Hybrid closed-loop insulin therapy may improve CFRD control without more hypoglycaemia and may reduce diabetes treatment burden.
records.confidence_reason: Structured retrospective study reports CGM metrics, HbA1c changes, sample characteristics, and safety observations.

records.primary_theme: Service delivery, access, and multidisciplinary care
secondary_themes: Care burden, adherence, and psychosocial impact
records.why_it_matters: Open-access webinars can extend CF professional education across countries and lower-resource settings.
records.confidence_reason: Structured programme review reports four years of webinar counts, attendance, geography, and topic expansion.

records.primary_theme: Precision CFTR biology and rare variants
secondary_themes: Emerging genetic, RNA, and cell-model therapies
records.why_it_matters: VTD may rescue some rare CFTR variants that do not respond to ETI, expanding personalized modulator options.
records.confidence_reason: Structured functional assay abstract reports patient-derived nasal epithelia testing, ETI comparison, and VTD response.

records.primary_theme: Real-world outcomes and registries
secondary_themes: Service delivery, access, and multidisciplinary care
records.why_it_matters: Standardized pregnancy reporting is needed to monitor maternal outcomes and in-utero modulator exposure across CF registries.
records.confidence_reason: Structured registry-report review describes country coverage, data elements, heterogeneity, and harmonization needs.

records.primary_theme: Modulator-era optimization
secondary_themes: Care burden, adherence, and psychosocial impact
records.why_it_matters: South African lived-experience data strengthen the case for equitable modulator access by showing gains in symptoms, burden, participation, and wellbeing.
records.confidence_reason: Structured mixed-methods study reports survey and interview samples, statistical improvements, and qualitative themes.

records.primary_theme: Diagnostics, screening, and biomarkers
records.why_it_matters: Insulinogenic index may help identify abnormal glucose tolerance before routine CFRD screening age, even after ETI.
records.confidence_reason: Structured pediatric OGTT study reports pre/post ETI testing, AGT categories, IGI modeling, and conclusions.

records.primary_theme: Service delivery, access, and multidisciplinary care
secondary_themes: Care burden, adherence, and psychosocial impact
records.why_it_matters: Digital group programmes can improve pediatric health behaviours, self-management confidence, and peer connection across a broad service area.
records.confidence_reason: Structured programme report describes multiple digital interventions, participants, pre/post survey changes, and scaling priorities.

records.primary_theme: Emerging genetic, RNA, and cell-model therapies
secondary_themes: Precision CFTR biology and rare variants
records.why_it_matters: Combining SPL84 ASO with ETI may add CFTR rescue for people carrying the 3849 splicing mutation plus a modulator-responsive allele.
records.confidence_reason: Structured HBE-cell study reports the mutation context, assay methods, single-agent effects, and additive combination results.
